answers.description: An AI-powered autonomous supply chain co-pilot that detects disruptions 24–72 hours early, simulates cascade failures, and executes reroute decisions before a single delivery is missed.
answers.problem: Global supply chains detect disruptions too late and lack connected, actionable intelligence at the moment of failure — Pigeon closes the Detection → Decision → Action gap from 4 hours to under 4 minutes.
answers.users: Logistics & supply chain managers, operations teams, freight forwarders, 3PLs, C-suite supply chain leaders
answers.goals: Predictive risk scoring per shipment leg, cascade impact simulation, autonomous reroute execution, real-time command center UI
answers.voice_tone: Professional and direct — confidence-inspiring, data-driven, no fluff
answers.design_principles: Demo-first, real signals where possible, modular structure that can scale to microservices
answers.database: In-memory + JSON seed files (no DB for now)
answers.infrastructure: Google Cloud (Cloud Run target), local dev first
answers.tdd_strictness: Flexible — tests recommended for complex logic (risk scoring, BFS traversal)
answers.code_review: Self-review OK — solo/small team hackathon project
